text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's victory is hotly anticipated as the
autumn Tenno Sho is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on defeating her, Super Creek finishes
practicing for her role as the villain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads over to the racecourse to stir up the
crowd at the autumn Tenno Sho.
